revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Erehiko-jinja]][[ja:鉛練比古神社]][[ko:에레히코 신사]] {{Expand Japanese|鉛練比古神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Erehiko Shrine | native_name = 鉛練比古神社 | image = Erenhiko-Shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Erehiko Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.542277|136.209145}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|qid=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui|en|Oyamakui no Kami|ja|大山咋神|simple|Oyamakui no Kami|zh|大山咋神|qid=Q10935105|1=Oyamakui no Kami}} }} {{nihongo|'''Erehiko Shrine'''|鉛練比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} * {{ill|Q135419779|ltq=Q135419779|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11638477|ltq=Q11638477|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 100 ** P155: {{ill|Takanono Shrine|lt=Takanono Shrine|qid=Q135039859|1=Takanono Shrine (Q135039859)}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039860|ltq=Q135039860|qid=Q135039860|1=Ohokurano Shrine (Q135039860)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q844130|ltq=Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} * {{ill|Ōmi Province|lt=Ōmi Province|ca|Província d'Ōmi|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆمی|cs|Provincie Ómi|de|Provinz Ōmi|en|Ōmi Province|es|Provincia de Ōmi|fa|ولایت اومی|fi|Ōmin provinssi|fr|Province d'Ōmi|gl|Provincia de Ōmi|hak|Ōmi-koet|id|Provinsi Ōmi|it|Ōmi|ja|近江国|ko|오미국|lt|Omio žemė|nl|Omi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Ōmi|pt|Província de Ōmi|ru|Оми (провинция)|simple|Ōmi Province|sk|Ómi (provincia)|sr|Провинција Оми|tr|Ōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Омі|vi|Tỉnh Ōmi|zh_min_nan|Ômi-kok|zh_yue|近江國|zh|近江國|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}} * {{ill|Q1042353|ltq=Q1042353|qid=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.542277|136.209145}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Erenhiko-Shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q10935105|ltq=Q10935105|qid=Q10935105|1=Oyamakui no Kami}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181880 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|lt=nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|fr|Nagare-zukuri|it|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|pl|Nagare-zukuri|ru|Нагарэ-дзукури|sv|Nagare-zukuri|zh|流造|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * えれひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005004514 == Commons category (P373) == * Erehiko-jinja == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Q135193727|ltq=Q135193727|qid=Q135193727|1=Erehiko Shrine okumiya}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市余呉町中之郷108', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Erehiko-jinja}} [[JA:鉛練比古神社]] [[KO:에레히코 신사]] {{wikidata link|Q11649828}} == Japanese content == {{Source clarification needed|date=June 14, 2016 (Tue) 12:44 (UTC)}} {{Shinto shrine |Name = Erenhiko Shrine |Image = [[File:Erenhiko-Shrine.jpg|270px]]
Torii gate and worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama City|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} 108 Nakanogo, Yogo-chō |Coordinates = {{Wikicoord2 degrees minutes seconds|35|32|31.9|N|136|12|33.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|qid=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami|Q10935105|qid=Q10935105|1=Oyamakui no Kami}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = Traditionally during the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|qid=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} |Main hall = {{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|lt=Ichigensha Nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation etc. = |Annual festival = {{ill|lt=April 14|Q2500|qid=Q2500|1=April 14}} |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Erenhiko
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''Erenhiko Shrine''' (えれひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Nagahama City|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === {{ill|qid=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami|Q10935105|qid=Q10935105|1=Oyamakui no Kami}} is the principal deity, with {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Hiboko-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} enshrined as an associated deity. === Shrine crest === Konoe peony === History === It is said that during the time of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|qid=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}}, descendants of Ame-no-Hiboko-no-Mikoto developed this area and enshrined their ancestral deity. Later, when the land became territory of {{ill|lt=Enryaku-ji|Q917195|qid=Q917195|1=Enryaku-ji}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hiyoshi Sannō Gongen|1=UNKNOWN}} (Ōyamakui-no-Kami), who was the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=guardian deity|1=UNKNOWN}} of the temple, was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=invited and enshrined|1=UNKNOWN}}, and the deities were {{ill|lt=enshrined together|Q11412524|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}}. In the first year of {{ill|lt=Genryaku|Q1194250|qid=Q1194250|1=Genryaku}} ({{ill|lt=1184|Q19728|qid=Q19728|1=1184}}), land within the precincts was donated, but the shrine buildings fell into ruin during the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|qid=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. In the 7th year of {{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|qid=Q1328185|1=Keichō}} ({{ill|lt=1602|Q6727|qid=Q6727|1=1602}}), land was again donated as tax-exempt land and the shrine was restored. In {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 55 ({{ill|lt=1980|Q2439|qid=Q2439|1=1980}}), because the {{ill|lt=Hokuriku Expressway|Q1549512|qid=Q1549512|1=Hokuriku Expressway}} came to pass through the precincts, new shrine buildings and other structures were constructed. This shrine is the small shrine “Namarenihiko Shrine” of Ōmi Province listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} (a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}). In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9 ({{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|qid=Q7766|1=1876}}), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Rituals === Annual festival: April 14 === Subsidiary shrines within the precincts === * Atago Shrine * Kitano Shrine * Shinmei Shrine * Kotohira Shrine * Nagahiro Inari Shrine * Nishi Tenjin Shrine * Memorial Spirit Shrine === Shrines outside the precincts === * Ōmizuwake Shrine … a {{ill|lt=disputed Shikinaisha|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * Minakuchi Shrine * No Shrine === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode=view=1&view:oid=1268 Erenhiko Shrine] (Shiga Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines) {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Erehiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Erehiko Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]
